scripts.check:server: node --check server/gameHost.js && node --check server/npcSim.js && node --check server/shops.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check server/authApi.js && node --check server/charStats.js && node --check server/persistence.test.js && node --check server/store/SqliteStore.js && node --check server/store/SupabaseStore.js && node --check server/store/index.js && node --check server/store/errors.js
scripts.test:server: node server/gameHost.test.js && node server/combat.test.js && node server/loot_carry.test.js && node server/store.test.js && node server/authApi.test.js && node server/charStats.test.js && node server/persistence.test.js
